calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-23-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-13-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Tomar Mason, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

David Perry, Esq. appeared for plaintiff(s) Wells Fargo Bank National Assoc.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) Spice of Life Caterersm, Inc., a corp; Jon Hoffman aka Jonathan Hoffman, aka Jonathan L. Hoffman for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $136,470.19
Prejudgment Interest - $32,176.25
Attorney's Fees - $2,825.00
Costs - $586.90
Total judgment in the amount of $172,058.34

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2011 Continued To Dec-09-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
